ksa_text: Knowledge of data processing and transformation techniques, including data manipulation, mapping, format conversion, cleansing, data fusion, and aggregation methods.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-K-005 (DA, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.3961 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.396, ddat=0.387, dcwf=0.387) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3961 below threshold for moderate fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DA-domain KSA DA-K-005 (composite 0.3961) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3961 for DA domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Financial Risk Specialist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DA domain KSA at composite 0.3961 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3961, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
